texto: King and Gandhi had found a way to use aggressive impulses to resist injustice without hurting others. Where did the aggression go? The answer, as King would later tell Poussaint, was this: into the courage needed to resist without fighting back physically...
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de S. Nassir Ghaemi que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “King and Gandhi had found a way to use aggressive impulses to resist injustice without hurting ot…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre coragem, empathy, gandhi, com foco em gandhi e mlk.
